is-on-https.title: Uses HTTPS
is-on-https.description: All sites should be protected with HTTPS, even ones that don't handle sensitive data.

redirects-http.title: Redirects HTTP traffic to HTTPS
redirects-http.description: If you've already set up HTTPS, make sure that you redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS.

service-worker.title: Registers a service worker that controls page and start_url
service-worker.description: The service worker is the technology that enables your app to use many Progressive Web App features, such as offline, add to homescreen, and push notifications.

works-offline.title: Current page responds with a 200 when offline
works-offline.description: If you're building a Progressive Web App, consider using a service worker so that your app can work offline.

installable-manifest.title: Web app manifest or service worker do not meet the installability requirements
installable-manifest.description: Service worker is the technology that enables your app to use many Progressive Web App features, such as offline, add to homescreen, and push notifications. With proper service worker and manifest implementations, browsers can proactively prompt users to add your app to their homescreen, which can lead to higher engagement.

splash-screen.title: Configured for a custom splash screen
splash-screen.description: A themed splash screen ensures a high-quality experience when users launch your app from their homescreens.

themed-omnibox.title: Sets a theme color for the address bar.
themed-omnibox.description: The browser address bar can be themed to match your site.

content-width.title: Content is sized correctly for the viewport
content-width.description: If the width of your app's content doesn't match the width of the viewport, your app might not be optimized for mobile screens.

viewport.title: Has a <meta name="viewport"> tag with width or initial-scale
viewport.description: Add a viewport meta tag to optimize your app for mobile screens.

without-javascript.title: Contains some content when JavaScript is not available
without-javascript.description: Your app should display some content when JavaScript is disabled, even if it's just a warning to the user that JavaScript is required.

apple-touch-icon.title: Provides a valid apple-touch-icon
apple-touch-icon.description: For ideal appearance on iOS when users add a Progressive Web App to the home screen, define an apple-touch-icon.

maskable-icon.title: Manifest has a maskable icon
maskable-icon.description: A maskable icon ensures that the image fills the entire shape without being letterboxed when installing the app on a device.

pwa-cross-browser.title: Site works cross-browser
pwa-cross-browser.description: To reach the most number of users, sites should work across every major browser.

pwa-page-transitions.title: Page transitions don't feel like they block on the network
pwa-page-transitions.description: Transitions should feel snappy as you tap around, even on a slow network.

pwa-each-page-has-url.title: Each page has a URL
pwa-each-page-has-url.description: Ensure individual pages are deep linkable via the URLs and that URLs are unique for the purpose of shareability on social media.

pwa.title: Progressive Web App
pwa.description: These checks validate the aspects of a Progressive Web App.

rendererFormattedStrings.varianceDisclaimer: Values are estimated and may vary.
rendererFormattedStrings.toplevelWarningsMessage: There were issues affecting this run of Lighthouse:
rendererFormattedStrings.lsPerformanceCategoryDescription: [Lighthouse Score] These encapsulate your app's current performance and opportunities to improve it.
